title: mysql_stmt_prepare() does not return on query with "order by ?"
poc: create table t (id int auto_increment primary key, n int);
select id,n from t order by ?";
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE test_table (id INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY, name VARCHAR(50), age INT, created_at TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP);
INSERT INTO test_table (name, age) VALUES ('Alice', 30), ('Bob', NULL), ('Charlie', 25);
SELECT id, name, age FROM test_table ORDER BY ?;
